score.overall_summary: Mohit is a highly promising candidate with a strong academic background from IIT Bombay, pursuing dual minors in CS&E and AI&DS. Despite being an undergraduate, he demonstrates exceptional technical proficiency in Python, Javascript, backend development, and a wide array of AI/ML technologies through significant internship and project experience. His competitive programming achievements and leadership roles further highlight his problem-solving abilities and collaborative spirit.
strengths: Exceptional proficiency in Python, Javascript, and related backend frameworks (Django, Node.js).
Extensive practical experience with diverse AI/ML technologies, including LLMs, Transformers, GANs, and Reinforcement Learning.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, evidenced by competitive programming and complex project work.
Demonstrated eagerness and aptitude for learning new technologies and complex domains.
Solid understanding of backend systems, APIs, databases, and development tools like Docker and Git.
missing_elements: No explicit mention of Golang experience, which is a desired skill.
Limited direct experience with large-scale production system deployment, monitoring, or reliability improvements.
While AI/ML exposure is strong, specific experience with real-time voice systems (SIP/WebRTC) or container orchestration (Kubernetes) is not detailed.
Phone number is missing from the resume.
No explicit mention of Linux CLI comfort, though implied by other tools.
